design/assets/btn-lose.png.provenance: 2026-07-16: gameplay stub WIN/LOSE jewel buttons (emerald star / ruby cracked heart), gpt-image warm — dedicated art per Batu (not the medals); 4 candidates inspected, gemini pair broke its grid.

design/assets/dog-detective-complete.png.provenance: 2026-07-16: iconographic success medal, gpt-image. Portal req_c19668: winfail=2 (medals). Reinstated after scenic-medal mixup (scenics go to gameplay buttons instead).

spec.description: Wool Crush soft currency: one compact golden-yellow ball of yarn wound into a clean round coin-like silhouette, with three broad curved strand bands, a short tucked yarn tail, and a small warm-gold rim glow. It is unmistakably yarn, not a metal coin.
spec.name: yarn_ball_coin
spec.prompt_extra: single centered object; tactile plush wool with restrained fiber texture; readable at 48px; no star, letters, face, animal, needle, or loose clutter; deeper honey-gold yarn with one crisp top highlight

variants.name: sunny
variants.prompt_extra: sunflower-yellow yarn, round and cheerful

variants.name: premium
variants.prompt_extra: deeper honey-gold yarn with one crisp top highlight

phrases.finish: tactile knitted wool and chunky yarn fibers, clean toy-like edges, saturated casual-game color, polished but never photoreal
phrases.lighting: soft studio key light with warm rim highlights, gentle ambient occlusion between stitches, crisp readable silhouette
phrases.rendering: premium 3D casual-game icon rendering made from crochet, felt, yarn, and padded fabric; transparent isolated assets; no scenery unless requested
phrases.shape: large friendly rounded forms, chunky braided outlines, simplified readable details, centered compositions with generous transparent breathing room

warnings: alpha recovered via matting fallback (model returned no alpha)

spec.description: Six shop tiers built only from the identical golden-yellow yarn-ball currency: 1) one yarn ball; 2) three yarn balls; 3) a small cream drawstring knitting pouch filled with yarn balls; 4) a woven basket filled with yarn balls; 5) a wooden yarn cart heaped with yarn balls; 6) an open cedar craft chest overflowing with yarn balls.

spec.description: Four Wool Crush saga-map node states sharing one thick spool-button geometry. CURRENT: a bright turquoise yarn spool with a warm golden rim and soft glow. COMPLETE: the cream spool with a bold golden stitched check mark on its center.
